chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Appl. No. S- 76 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 16.03.2026 For orders on office objections For hearing of main case Mr. Saleem Yousif, Advocate for Ms. Sana Memon, APG The offence with which the applicant is charged carries potential sentence of three years and although non-bailable, falls within the non- prohibitory clause of Section 497 Cr.P.C. Keeping in mind the principles enunciated in the case of Tariq Bashir & 5 others v. The State (PLD 1995 S.C. 34), I do not see any exceptional or extra-ordinary reason to deny the applicant bail. Also in view of the fact that he does not have a criminal record. He is therefore, admitted to post-arrest bail against a surety of Rs. 1,00,000/- (One Lac) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of learned trial court.. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
